Back to Recipes

Oat Pancakes

Ingredients

  • 500ml Water
  • 2 Bananas
  • 100g Rolled Oats
  • 125g Flour (50/50 normal and wholemeal)
  • 1 Tsp Cinnamon
  • 2 Tsp Baking Powder
  • 1/2 Tsp Baking Soda
  • 1/2 Tsp Salt
  • 1 Tbsp Apple Cider or White Vine Vinegar
  • 3 Tbsp Sunflower Oil

Instructions

  1. Blend 250ml water and 2 bananas until completely liquid. While blending, add 100g oats and continue blending.
  2. In a bowl mix flour, ground flaxseeds, cinnamon, Baking Powder, Baking Soda, Salt, Vinegar and Sunflower Oil.
  3. Add the banana-oat-mixture to the bowl. Fill the blender glass with the remaining water, blend and add to bowl.
  4. Stir until the ingredients are evenly combined. Let the mixture rest for 5 minutes.
  5. Add pancake mixture (2 tablespoons per pancake) to pan and fry until golden brown.

Adapted from The Worktop
